$SpaceX AIRDROP REWARDS

$SpaceX took the cryto space by storm when we listed on Kucoin getting to an All Time High of over $5. That's just the beginning. WIth the 2nd airdrop starting, expect $SpaceX to peak at $20 before the full bull season. Rid yourself of FOMO and get involved. The Fastest NFT Marketplace

Opensea's NFT Monopoly is already been threatened with our launch and the airdropping of millions of $SpaceX to our first users. $SpaceX's migration to our present ecosystem will witness a further peak and adoption as the number one NFT Marketplace. In Season 2, further millions of $SpaceX token will be distributed further to our users. The goal is to become the number one NFT marketplace.

$SpaceX Staking, Incentivization + Consensus

The second $SpaceX airdrop has only one purpose:to increase the userbase and make $SpaceX wildly adopted. To further reward our users, the staking portal will open immediately we commense the 2nd airdrop distribution. By staking your $SpaceX, you automatically qualified for our vintage NFT.
